case_title: OSCARYNE WILLIAMS VS. STATE OF CALIFORNIA, DEPARTMENT OF TRANPORTATION

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,705.31 FILED BY WILLIAMS, OSCARYNE AS TO DEFENDANT STATE OF CALIFORNIA, DEPARTMENT OF TRANPORTATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-14-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, OSCARYNE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT STATE OF CALIFORNIA, DEPARTMENT OF TRANPORTATION PLAINTIFF DID NOT ESTABLISH THAT DEFENDANT HAD PRIOR, ACTUAL OR CONSTRUCTIVE NOTICE OF THE HIGHWAY TREE DEBRIS, AND THUS COULD NOT ESTABLISH LIABILITY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
REMARK: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 9/30/16 RETURNED BY U.S. POSTAL SERVICE LABELED "INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, OSCARYNE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-15-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-15-2016 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF OSCARYNE WILLIAMS AND DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE ROCHELLE GARCIA, CLAIMS OFFICER FOR CALTRANS. TREVA STEWART, A WITNESS FOR PLAINTIFF, WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. BERNARD VINCENT, A WITNESS FOR DEFENDANT, WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. PARTIES SIGNED THE STIPULATION FOR PRO TEM JUDGE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. THE COURT RETAINED EXHIBITS FROM BOTH PLAINTIFF & DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-14-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-15-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE TREVA STEWART, DAUGHTER OF OSCARYNE WILLIAMS. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT STATE OF CALIFORNIA, DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORATION. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE A PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY WILLIAMS, OSCARYNE STATE OF CALIFORNIA, DEPARTMENT OF TRANPORTATION
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-15-2016 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-11-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT STATE OF CALIFORNIA, DEPARTMENT OF TRANPORTATION
